tracks.rawText: 4:10**Title: On the Edge of Starting**v5Neo-psychedelia reggae fusion with soft trap textures opens with lush synth pads and a deep, dubby bassline, Syncopated reggae guitar pairs with a crisp, laid-back trap hi-hat groove, Confident, ethereal female vocals float above, surrounded by swirling cosmic effects, Elegant, understated brass and filtered arpeggios color the chorus, while the bridge isolates the rich bass and reverb-soaked keys for an intimate, luxurious feel before the finale blooms into glittering electronics and expressive rhythmsJulyePublishRemix
tracks.title: **Title: On the Edge of Starting**
